title: Does Solar Increase Home Value?
description: Solar can increase home value in some markets, especially when the system is owned rather than leased.
quickAnswer: Solar may increase home value, but the impact varies by market, system ownership, age, savings, and buyer preferences.

scenario.title: Home Value Example
details: Buyer sees lower monthly ownership cost

faqs.question: Are leased panels harder to sell with?
faqs.answer: They can be. Buyers may need to assume the lease, so review transfer terms before signing.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy homeowner solar resources
DSIRE state and utility incentive database
